un.caen.controller

Class GameController

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.controller.GameController

  • public class GameController
extends java.lang.Object
    The GameController class manages the game logic and player interactions in a grid-based game. It handles the setup of the game environment, including walls and energy kits, manages player positioning, actions (move, attack, energy), and checks for game over conditions.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      GameController(Game game)
      Constructs a GameController with the specified game model.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Player announceWinner()
      Announces the winner of the game.
      java.lang.Boolean applyPlayerAction(Player currentPlayer, PlayerAction action, Weapon weapon, Direction direction)
      Applies the action of the current player based on the specified action type.
      boolean checkGameOver()
      Checks if the game is over.
      void clearTrace()
      Clears the trace of actions in the game.
      void getBoardDisplay()
      Displays the current state of the game board.
      Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Retrieves the current player.
      Grid getGrid()
      Retrieves the grid of the game.
      java.util.List<PlayerProxy> getPlayerProxies()
      Returns the list of PlayerProxy objects representing the players in the game.
      java.util.List<Player> getPlayers()
      Retrieves the list of players currently in the game.
      void getPlayerStatus()
      Retrieves the status of the players.
      void nextTurn()
      Advances to the next turn in the game.
      void positionPhase()
      Initiates the positioning phase of the game, setting up player positions.
      void selectionPhase(java.util.List<Player> players)
      Sets the players for the game.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • GameController

        public GameController(Game game)
        Constructs a GameController with the specified game model.
        Parameters:
        game - the game model to be controlled

    • Method Detail

      • getPlayerProxies

        public java.util.List<PlayerProxy> getPlayerProxies()
        Returns the list of PlayerProxy objects representing the players in the game.
        Returns:
        a list of PlayerProxy objects

      • positionPhase

        public void positionPhase()
        Initiates the positioning phase of the game, setting up player positions.

      • selectionPhase

        public void selectionPhase(java.util.List<Player> players)
        Sets the players for the game.
        Parameters:
        players - a list of players to be set in the game model

      • applyPlayerAction

        public java.lang.Boolean applyPlayerAction(Player currentPlayer,
                                           PlayerAction action,
                                           Weapon weapon,
                                           Direction direction)
        Applies the action of the current player based on the specified action type.
        Parameters:
        currentPlayer - the player performing the action
        action - the action to be performed (MOVE, ATTACK, ENERGY)
        weapon - the weapon used for the attack (if applicable)
        direction - the direction of the action
        Returns:
        true if the action was successful, false otherwise

      • checkGameOver

        public boolean checkGameOver()
        Checks if the game is over.
        Returns:
        true if the game is over (1 or fewer players), false otherwise

      • announceWinner

        public Player announceWinner()
        Announces the winner of the game.
        Returns:
        the winning player

      • getPlayers

        public java.util.List<Player> getPlayers()
        Retrieves the list of players currently in the game.
        Returns:
        a list of players

      • getCurrentPlayer

        public Player getCurrentPlayer()
        Retrieves the current player.
        Returns:
        the current player

      • getPlayerStatus

        public void getPlayerStatus()
        Retrieves the status of the players.

      • nextTurn

        public void nextTurn()
        Advances to the next turn in the game.

      • getBoardDisplay

        public void getBoardDisplay()
        Displays the current state of the game board.

      • getGrid

        public Grid getGrid()
        Retrieves the grid of the game.
        Returns:
        the grid of the game

      • clearTrace

        public void clearTrace()
        Clears the trace of actions in the game.
